Meet the Crew

Fam Jam Collective

Three DJs. Rotating styles. One vibe tailored to your crowd (kid-appropriate cool).

We're three parents of kids under 5 who all met at Lightning in a Bottle music festival. Since then, we've spent our weekends hosting family-friendly parties in backyards and DJing in living rooms — keeping the good times going while still being home for bedtime. We love music, we love a good party, and we've gotten very good at reading a room that has both a grandma and a toddler in it.

"The ABBA Lift"
Golden hour drops and suddenly the whole backyard is singing. Every word. Even the people who weren't dancing.
